title: Vectorientation
description: Rotates falling blocks in towards where they're heading, with configurable squash & stretch
body:
This clientside mod gives falling blocks a bit more *life* by rotating them to face the direction they're flying towards. Additionally, it applies some squash & stretch to them based on their speed, the amount of which can be fully configured and disabled on a per-block basis.

The mod is entirely clientside, so you can play on any server with this.

Found a bug or want to suggest a feature? Let me know on [Discord](https://discord.gg/tw5SJxqC)!
